hero.sub: Two movers + cargo van. From $150/hr, $300 minimum. Same-week local moves across Metro Vancouver.
hero.trust_line: Real humans. Vancouver-based. Currently booking same-week.

compare.headline: How a move actually works at Inlet.
compare.old_title: How a move typically goes (the old way).
compare.new_title: How a move actually works at Inlet.
old_list: Strangers in your home for an "estimate"
Anonymous crews · no introduction · no accountability
Heavy item upcharges per piano, fridge, sofa
No accountability if something is damaged
new_list: Real human texts back inside an hour
Quote in 60 seconds online — no site visit

bento.headline: The whole move, on one page.

ai_inventory.title: AI photo inventory
ai_inventory.body: Walk your home with the camera. We identify items, estimate volume, and price the move — without a site visit.

documentation.title: Photo documentation
documentation.body: Every job gets photo records of fragile items, before-and-after states, and load-out. If anything's questioned, there's proof.

bodycam.title: Bodycam ops
bodycam.body: Crew bodycams for senior and multigen moves. You see what we see. Footage archived for 90 days.

live_tracking.title: Live crew tracking
live_tracking.body: Watch the truck en route. SMS updates today; live map by Q3.

quote_receipt.title: Itemized quote
quote_receipt.body: Hourly billing. No fuel surcharge, no stair fee, no weekend upcharge. Quote = bill.

items.label: Average response to a quote request
Average overage from quote to final bill
Cargo + liability coverage on every move

trust.headline: The boring stuff, all in order.

scenes.label: Scene 01 · The booking
scenes.headline: Maya needs to move.
scenes.body: She opens Inlet Move on her laptop. Six fields. No login. The whole thing takes the time it does to make coffee.

scenes.label: Scene 02 · The walkthrough
scenes.headline: She walks the room with her phone.
scenes.body: Camera identifies the sofa, the bookshelf, the lamp. Volume estimated. Hours estimated. No padded surprise.

scenes.label: Scene 03 · The quote
scenes.headline: A real number, in minutes.
scenes.body: Hourly. Honest. Fuel and stairs included. The price you see is the price you pay.

scenes.label: Scene 04 · Move day
scenes.headline: Two pros, on time.
scenes.body: Branded crew. Photo-documented load. SMS updates while you do the rest of your day.

scenes.label: Scene 05 · Settled
scenes.headline: And it's done.
scenes.body: Boxes in the right rooms. Receipt in your inbox. Your weekend back.

final_cta.headline: Ready to move?
final_cta.sub: Quote in 60 seconds. Real human follow-up within the hour.

notes.label: Anything we should know?
notes.placeholder: Stairs, elevator, parking, pets, religious or ceremonial items, anything else.

honesty.ai_inventory: AI photo inventory is in development. Today, we use a manual estimator behind the scenes; photos help us prep, not price.
honesty.bodycam: Bodycam ops are in pilot for Q4 2026. Today, we provide photo documentation on every job.
honesty.live_tracking: Live crew tracking ships Q3 2026. Until then, you get SMS updates.
